title:
A double storey fully furnished apartment, located in kabulonga with 6 in the complex. Each apartment has 1 designated parking space along with plenty of guest parking. 

The apartment is set as a open plan lounge and dinning with the kitchen seperate with small scullery and laundry. All three bedrooms are upstairs with the master en-suite and the other two rooms sharing a bath and shower. 

In the complex all apartments have a small back yard patio which also gives you access to the communal pool. The complex also has a generator which powers the whole complex along with 24 hour security.
amenities:

    Dining Area
    Separate Lounge

  • Outdoor Spaces Two Front Yards:
    Backyard with Pool

title: This two bedroom fully furnished is set to open plan kitchen, dinning and lounge with a modern touch of quality. A small laundry room to the right of the entrance as well as a scullery and guest toilet. Both rooms are en-suite, The master bedroom has a classic wooden walk in closet space along with a shower and bathtub and the second a shower. The apartment has a small back yard, washing and cleaning service is available as it boasts its own washing area outside the apartment. There is a gym with two pools available, back up power, designated parking with guest spaces too. 24 hour security a big back up generater so power is alwsys provided.
